name: team_task_update
description: Update an existing task in the team's shared task memory. Use this to modify task details, change priority, update descriptions, or add metadata without changing the task status. For status changes, use specific functions like team_task_claim, team_task_complete, or team_task_error.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to update

task_title.description: Updated brief, descriptive title for the task

task_description.description: Updated detailed description of what needs to be accomplished

estimated_duration.description: Updated estimated time to complete (e.g., '30 minutes', '2 hours', '1 day')

required_capabilities.description: Updated list of capabilities/functions needed to complete this task

dependencies.description: Updated list of task IDs that must be completed before this task can start

deadline.description: Updated deadline for task completion (ISO 8601 format)

metadata.description: Additional or updated task-specific data or context

merge_metadata.description: If true, merge new metadata with existing. If false, replace all metadata.

parameters.task_description: Updated: Analyze GitHub issues for project XYZ and create summary report with recommendations
